POST /v2/proposals.purpose: Create draft proposal; returns premium breakup

nominee.note: optional at proposal stage per underwriting.nominee.required_at_proposal

response.note: per-member PED waiting period NOT exposed in v2 response

POST /v2/proposals/:id/submit.purpose: Lock proposal after review; moves DRAFT -> SUBMITTED

GET /v2/proposals/:id/form.purpose: Render-ready proposal form JSON for customer review

GET /v2/proposals/:id.purpose: Status poll — includes payment_status and policy_no once issued

GET /v2/payments/:token.purpose: Payment page bootstrap — amount, proposal summary

POST /v2/payments/:token/confirm.purpose: Simulated PG callback; SUBMITTED -> ISSUED, generates policy_no
